concerns.text: FR-003 requires calculating the 'top-20 CRE overlap percentage between thresholds' and reporting it. Task T007 mentions generating 'overlap statistics' but does not explicitly cover the specific logic to calculate the top-20 overlap percentage or the sorting criteria (adjusted p-value, then |β₁|) defined in FR-003. This specific metric is missing a dedicated task.

FR-014 mandates that distal CREs failing validation (no motif OR Hi-C evidence) MUST be 'excluded from the mixed-model analysis'. Task T013 implements the validation logic but lacks an explicit task to perform the filtering/exclusion step before the data is passed to T016 (GLS fitting). Without this, invalid pairs may enter the model.

FR-017 requires a sensitivity analysis comparing the 'full set' (post-FR-014) against the 'filtered set' (post-VIF exclusion) to 'quantify selection bias'. Task T026 implements the analysis but does not explicitly define the task to isolate and compare these two specific sets to quantify the bias introduced by the VIF filter, risking a generic comparison.

SC-005 requires reporting summit match statistics specifically for the 'top-10 CREs in the final ranked table (FDR ≤ 0.05)'. Task T032 implements the summit match verification but does not explicitly bind the input to the *final* FDR-filtered ranked table, risking verification against an unfiltered peak set.

FR-011 requires specific error handling: fatal error if an entire stress column is missing in eQTL, and warning/exclusion if individual genes are missing. Task T005 (download) and T010 (validation) do not explicitly cover the logic to parse eQTL columns and trigger these specific fatal/warning paths.

FR-015 requires weighting the predictor by 'log(motif_score + 1)' OR 'log(hi_c_score + 1)'. Task T015 mentions 'weight calculation' but does not explicitly task the implementation of the conditional logic to choose between motif and Hi-C scores based on which validation passed (FR-014).

FR-016 requires an explicit disclaimer 'results are associational, not causal' in all report outputs. Task T027 adds the disclaimer, but there is no task ensuring this disclaimer is programmatically injected into the specific output files (Markdown tables, PDF) generated by T018 and T028, only that it is 'added'.
